author: @code_kartik
text:
CleanShot X is great. The subscription isn't.

So I rebuilt BetterShot from the ground up native Swift, zero web views, zero tauri.

BetterShot now runs natively on macOS, powered by Swift 6 + SwiftUI.

Here's what you get for free, forever:

- Region, fullscreen & window capture
- Beautiful backgrounds gradients, solids, macOS wallpapers, custom images
- Annotations arrows, shapes, text, blur, spotlight, numbered badges
- OCR text extraction + QR/barcode scanning
- Color picker
- Pin screenshots as floating windows
- Self-timer with countdown overlay
- Capture history
- In-app updates
- Lives in your menu bar. No Dock clutter.

Local-first. No cloud. No telemetry. No subscription.

Open source → https://t.co/T6jfmqg4jG
   
Try it → https://t.co/oPkkjxsyZC
